title: Incorporators

PART II.  INCORPORATION

§21.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
